tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: As Long As You Love Me

content:
Verse 1: 


[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]
Remember all the things we wanted[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]
Now all our memories, they're haunted[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]   
We were always meant to say goodbye[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]AM[/ch]
Even without fists held high, yeah[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]
Never would have worked out right, yeah[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
We were never meant for do or die[/tab]

BRIDGE:
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]AM[/ch]
I didn't want us to burn out[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
I didn't come here to hurt you now[/tab]

I can't stop


CHORUS:

[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
I want you to know[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
That it doesn't matter[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]
Where we take this road[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
Someone's gotta go[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
And I want you to know[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
You couldn't have loved me better[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]
But I want you to move on[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
So I'm already gone[/tab]


VERSE 2:

[tab]             [ch]AM[/ch]
Looking at you makes it harder[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]
But I know that you'll find another[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
That doesn't always make you wanna cry[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]AM[/ch]
Started with a perfect kiss[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Then we could feel the poison set in[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]AM[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Perfect couldn't keep this love alive[/tab]

BRIDGE:

[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]AM[/ch]           
You know that I love you so[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]AM[/ch]
I love you enough to let you go[/tab]

CHORUS:


[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
I want you to know[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
That it doesn't matter[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]
Where we take this road[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
Someone's gotta go[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
And I want you to know[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
You couldn't have loved me better[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]
But I want you to move on[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
So I'm already gone[/tab]



(SAME AS CHORUS)

I'm already gone

I'm already gone

You can't make it feel right

When you know that it's wrong

I'm already gone

Already gone

There's no moving on

So I'm already gone

Already gone, already gone, already gone



[tab]               [ch]AM[/ch]
Remember all the things we wanted[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]EM[/ch]
Now all our memories, they're haunted[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]AM[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
We were always meant to say goodbye[/tab]


(SAme CHORDS AS ABOVE FOR CHORUS)

I want you to know
That it doesn't matter
Where we take this road
Someone's gotta go
And I want you to know
You couldn't have loved me better
But I want you to move on
So I'm already gone

I'm already gone
I'm already gone
You can't make it feel right
When you know that it's wrong
I'm already gone
Already gone
There's no moving on
So I'm already gone...


(END SONG ON [ch]C[/ch])
